## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content updates, performance metrics, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content refreshes now include lighter updates at the top of posts with relevant documentation links](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Integration pages SEO review complete; performance plateauing due to keyword search volume limits](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [LLM referrals (esp. GPT) increasing; new referrals from Perplexity observed](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Ongoing projects: comparison page automation, image workflow tweaks, publishing/staging improvements](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates and Workflows

  - [Refreshes: Lighter updates added to post tops w/ grouped doc links (Strapi + vendor)](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [New content on track; no major surprises](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [Comparison page: Engineering team working on automation flow (template-based)](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Image workflow: In progress, style tweaks ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Publishing/staging: Improvements ongoing; unexpected blog post issue resolved](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Octave integration: Manual updates continuing; automation being scoped](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Sessions: Leveled off past 3-4 weeks, slightly below all-time high](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Google remains top referral source](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Non-branded impressions increasing](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)
  - [Conversion events:](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [HubSpot form events ↑](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [Contact sales & pricing links ↓](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [Month-to-month event triggers stable](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)

### Integration Pages SEO Review

  - [Content generally on-point; no major recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Previous FAQ UX concerns reiterated](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Inconsistent UX noted (e.g., missing header images, FAQs on some pages)](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [\~4-5 pages performing well; others limited by search volume](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Performance likely peaked due to existing keyword search volume](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)

### LLM Referrals

  - [Week-on-week increase](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [GPT remains top referrer](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [New referrals from Perplexity observed](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

### AI Visibility Strategies

  - [For integration pages: Limited opportunities due to content nature](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [General content: Incorporate question-based H2s mimicking search queries](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Competitor pages: Utilizing comparison formats (e.g., "Why choose X over Y?")](https://fathom.video/share/bPh7VnvC9TNwpxkoi992RjR-z1MgaHzy?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
